tagline: Chain-scoped assistants for Wok to Walk sites — local ops first, Transition Agents for Europe-wide sustainability.
storyIntro: Wok Assist is your on-site co-pilot for Wok to Walk: equipment on this venue, local events and catering, and the buildings dashboard you already use. When a question needs Europe-wide grants, finance, or marketplace depth, Assist does not invent that alone — it brings in a Transition Agent, then helps you apply the answer to this chain.
bestFor: Site managers checking tonight’s events or catering demand nearby
Ops leads comparing this venue’s equipment to efficient alternatives
Owners who want NL / EU funding and payback without leaving the W2W context

valuePoints.title: Knows your chain
valuePoints.detail: Venue equipment lists, site map, and W2W-flavoured assist — not a generic chatbot.

valuePoints.title: Uses live tools
valuePoints.detail: Events ticker, buildings dashboard, deep dive, and company map open from the same desk.

valuePoints.title: Borrows Europe-wide expertise
valuePoints.detail: Andrieus, Vincent, Artemis and the team stay the source for schemes, tariffs, and catalogues.

valuePoints.title: Hands back to W2W use cases
valuePoints.detail: Platform answers return with chain and site context so upgrades fit this restaurant, not a theory.

primaryAssist.label: Wok Assist
primaryAssist.notes: Reference restaurant agent UI. Pass siteId + companyId=wok-to-walk on asks.

surfaces.label: Wok Assist chat
surfaces.howUsed: Ask in plain language about this site’s equipment, energy habits, or what to open next. Assist keeps W2W context and can open the tools below.

surfaces.label: Amsterdam events & catering ticker
surfaces.howUsed: Assist opens Events or Catering when local demand matters — e.g. busy nights near the venue. Back-link returns you to Wok Assist.

surfaces.label: Greenways buildings dashboard
surfaces.howUsed: Portfolio KPIs, utility glance, and embedded Assist for the selected W2W site — see energy, then ask what to do.

surfaces.label: Restaurant equipment deep dive
surfaces.howUsed: Walk a wok burner or fridge from the W2W inventory list into alternatives, grants chips, and savings projection.

surfaces.label: Company / sites map
surfaces.howUsed: See which W2W sites sit in the portfolio and jump into site-scoped tools with the right companyId.

agents.name: Wok Assist
agents.roleLine: Site equipment, local events, catering, and day-to-day ops for Wok to Walk.

collaborationFlow.title: Ask locally
collaborationFlow.detail: You ask Wok Assist about a W2W site — e.g. wok burners, a busy weekend, or which tool to open.

collaborationFlow.title: Use chain tools
collaborationFlow.detail: Assist uses the events ticker, dashboard, deep dive, or equipment list that already know this brand.

collaborationFlow.title: Receive from Transition Agents
collaborationFlow.detail: For grants, payback, EU deals, or marketplace depth, Assist hands you to Andrieus, Vincent, Artemis, or another specialist — with chainId and site context.

collaborationFlow.title: Hone for Wok to Walk
collaborationFlow.detail: Platform guidance comes back into W2W language: this venue’s equipment, this city’s events, this site’s next step — not a generic EU essay.

journeys.exampleQuestion: There’s a big event near our Amsterdam site this weekend — what should we watch for catering?

steps.label: Local signal
steps.detail: Wok Assist opens the Amsterdam events & catering ticker for demand near the venue.

steps.label: Ops focus
steps.detail: You stay in W2W context — busy night planning, not Europe policy.

steps.label: Optional handoff
steps.detail: If you then ask about funding a bigger kitchen line, Assist points you to Andrieus or Artemis.

journeys.assistPrompt: What’s on the events and catering ticker near our Amsterdam site this weekend?

journeys.exampleQuestion: Our wok burners use a lot of gas — what funding and payback look like if we upgrade?

steps.label: Chain inventory
steps.detail: Assist / deep dive starts from the W2W wok burner list for this site — real equipment, not a blank form.

steps.label: Receive from Transition Agents
steps.detail: Andrieus covers NL / EU schemes; Vincent frames payback and energy prices; Artemis helps compare alternatives.

steps.label: Hone for W2W
steps.detail: Answers are applied to this restaurant’s burners and site — then you can reopen Assist or the dashboard for the next action.

journeys.assistPrompt: Help me plan a gas wok burner upgrade for our Wok to Walk site — grants and payback.

journeys.exampleQuestion: Show me how this site is using energy, then what to do next.

steps.label: See it
steps.detail: Buildings dashboard gives KPIs and utility glance for the selected W2W site.

steps.label: Ask Assist
steps.detail: Embedded Wok Assist explains what the numbers suggest in ops language.

steps.label: Widen when needed
steps.detail: Tariffs or green deals → Zara / Vincent; monitoring stack → Edwardo — then return to this site’s plan.

journeys.assistPrompt: Walk me through this site’s energy picture and what to do next.

handoffsToPlatform.w2wExample: Which NL schemes might support a kitchen line upgrade at our Leidseplein-style site?
Illustrate payback if we replace high-gas wok burners on this site.

handoffsToPlatform.when: Marketplace alternatives, renovation, deep dive beyond venue list
handoffsToPlatform.w2wExample: Compare efficient alternatives to our listed wok burners and cold line.

handoffsToPlatform.when: EU energy deals / spotlights not specific to W2W
handoffsToPlatform.w2wExample: Any hospitality energy deals that could matter for our NL sites?
Show restaurant energy-saving stories we can benchmark against.
Find water-saving kit ideas that fit a busy wok kitchen.
What monitoring path fits a multi-site W2W portfolio?

handoffBriefDefaults.brandHint: Wok to Walk hospitality — site-specific equipment and ops context attached when siteId known

tips: Start with the site and the problem (“Leidseplein wok burners”) — Assist can attach chain tools faster.
Use the events ticker for local demand; use Transition Agents for funding and catalogues.
After a specialist answers, come back to Wok Assist or the dashboard to turn it into a site action.
cloneChecklist: Copy this JSON to data/tenant-agent-packs/{chainId}.json and set chainId / brandName / companyId
Fork or white-label Chef 3 W2W .html → chain assist HTML + /greenways/{slug}-assist route
Fill storyIntro, valuePoints, journeys, and howUsed on each surface
Keep Europe-wide answers on Transition Agents — tenant agents only own chain facts
